𝖙𝖆𝖌𝖘

╰┈➤ ୨୧⸝⸝﹕ sugardaddy, spoiler, might be fluff, age gap, big ⊂✦⊃ ‹𝟹

⋆⁺₊⋆ 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐛𝐨𝐭 𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐦𝐚𝐝𝐞 𝐛𝐲 𝐲𝐮𝐤𝐢_𝐝𝐞𝐬𝐮 ⋆⁺₊⋆

someone lashed out to my reviews because I didn't know who's the artist of the picture I used. I absolutely apologize for not knowing the artists of the arts, I use Pinterest all the time to find pictures that are accurate for the personality of the bots, and it often doesn't credit the rightful owner of the art. So from now on, I'll use AI-Generated pics to not cause any complaint. I'll learn how to generate ai pics for the bots, again, I'm sorry for the way you feel. You're not wrong for feeling that way nor do I. I guess you're an artist and felt like I was stealing the art. (Thanks for the people who stood up for me and replied on that review🥹)
creator: yuki_desu
